commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=43e0f916942cb6530a6233bc334754cf7615fdfd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `waitForAgentJob` so its outer timeout returns a pending lifecycle error snapshot, and adds a fake-timer regression test for that race.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +34. Total +46 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main queues lifecycle errors behind a 15s grace timer while the outer `waitForAgentJob` timeout can still resolve `null` first. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs author or maintainer revision because the patch changes the wait/error contract and still lacks real behavior proof, so it is not a safe automated repair lane candidate.

target.title: fix(agent-job): surface pending error snapshot when outer timeout fires
target.body:
### What

Fixes a race condition in `waitForAgentJob` that caused pending agent errors to be discarded when the primary timeout fired.

### Why

When an agent job fails, an `error` event schedules the job to finish with an error snapshot after a 15-second grace period. If the outer `timeoutMs` for `waitForAgentJob` fires before this grace period elapses, it calls `finish(null)`, canceling the pending error.

The caller receives a generic timeout message instead of the actual root cause, making debugging difficult.

### How

The outer timeout callback now checks for a pending error via `getPendingAgentRunError()` before resolving with `null`. This function reads from a module-level map that is populated as soon as the `error` event is received, guaranteeing that the snapshot is available if the race occurs.

A new regression test using fake timers (`5s < 15s`) confirms the fix.

Closes #52497

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Race condition in `waitForAgentJob` — outer timeout fires `finish(null)`, discarding the pending error snapshot. Caller gets a generic timeout instead of the actual agent failure reason.

**Real environment tested:** Local openclaw/openclaw checkout, Node 24.x, WSL2 Ubuntu. Gateway `waitForAgentJob` path exercised directly using fake timers.

**Exact steps or command run after fix:**
```
pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts --reporter=verbose
```

**Evidence (branch-local run):**
```
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > waitForAgentJob > maps lifecycle end events with aborted=true to timeout 3ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > waitForAgentJob > keeps non-aborted lifecycle end events as ok 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > waitForAgentJob > can ignore cached snapshots and wait for fresh lifecycle events 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > waitForAgentJob > surfaces pending error snapshot when outer timeout fires before error grace period 3ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > prepends a compact timestamp matching formatZonedTimestamp 3ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > uses channel envelope format with DOW prefix 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > always uses 24-hour format 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > uses the configured timezone 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > defaults to UTC when no timezone specified 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > returns empty/whitespace messages unchanged 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > does NOT double-stamp messages with channel envelope timestamps 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > does NOT double-stamp messages already injected by us 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > does NOT double-stamp messages with cron-injected timestamps 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > handles midnight correctly 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > handles date boundaries (just before midnight) 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > handles DST correctly (same UTC hour, different local time) 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > injectTimestamp > accepts a custom now date 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > timestampOptsFromConfig > 'extracts timezone from config' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > timestampOptsFromConfig > 'falls back gracefully with empty conf…' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > normalizeRpcAttachmentsToChatAttachments > 'passes through string content' 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > normalizeRpcAttachmentsToChatAttachments > 'converts Uint8Array content to base64' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > normalizeRpcAttachmentsToChatAttachments > 'converts ArrayBuffer content to base64' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > normalizeRpcAttachmentsToChatAttachments > 'drops attachments without usable cont…' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > normalizeRpcAttachmentsToChatAttachments > accepts dashboard image attachments with nested base64 source 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > sanitizeChatSendMessageInput > 'rejects null bytes' 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > sanitizeChatSendMessageInput > 'strips unsafe control characters whil…' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > sanitizeChatSendMessageInput > 'normalizes unicode to NFC' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > gateway chat transcript writes (guardrail) > routes transcript writes through helper and SessionManager parentId append 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > ExecApprovalRequestParams validation > accepts request with resolvedPath 'omitted' 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > ExecApprovalRequestParams validation > accepts request with resolvedPath 'string' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > ExecApprovalRequestParams validation > accepts request with resolvedPath 'undefined' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > ExecApprovalRequestParams validation > accepts request with resolvedPath 'null' 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > rejects host=node approval requests without nodeId 3ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > rejects host=node approval requests without systemRunPlan 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > returns pending approval details for exec.approval.get 3ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > returns not found for stale exec.approval.get ids 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > broadcasts request + resolve 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > rejects allow-always when the request ask mode is always 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > does not reuse a resolved exact id as a prefix for another pending approval 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > stores versioned system.run binding and sorted env keys on approval request 12ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > includes Windows-compatible env keys in approval env bindings 10ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > stores sorted env keys for gateway approvals without node-only binding 2002ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > prefers systemRunPlan canonical command/cwd when present 12ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > derives a command preview from the fallback command for older node plans 11ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > sanitizes invisible Unicode format chars in approval display text without changing node bindings 11ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > accepts resolve during broadcast 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > accepts explicit approval ids 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > accepts unique short approval id prefixes 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > rejects ambiguous short approval id prefixes without leaking candidate ids 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > returns deterministic unknown/expired message for missing approval ids 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > resolves only the targeted approval id when multiple requests are pending 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > forwards turn-source metadata to exec approval forwarding 4ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > fast-fails approvals when no approver clients and no forwarding targets 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > keeps approvals pending when iOS push delivery accepted the request 52ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > sends iOS cleanup delivery on resolve 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > sends iOS cleanup delivery on expiration 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > keeps approvals pending when the originating chat can handle /approve directly 51ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > exec approval handlers > keeps approvals pending when no approver clients but forwarding accepted the request 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > gateway healthHandlers.status scope handling > requests includeSensitive=false for scopes [ 'operator.read' ] 1ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > gateway healthHandlers.status scope handling > requests includeSensitive=true for scopes [ 'operator.admin' ] 0ms
 ✓ |gateway| src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts > logs.tail > falls back to latest rolling log file when today is missing 7ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  61 passed (61)
   Start at  20:26:09
   Duration  8.16s (transform 3.68s, setup 191ms, import 5.53s, tests 2.24s, environment 0ms)
```

**Observed result:** All 61 tests pass. The new regression test (`surfaces pending error snapshot when outer timeout fires before error grace period`) passed and asserts that the pending error snapshot is returned when the outer timeout fires before the error grace period.

**What was not tested:** Race with sub-100ms timeouts; concurrent multi-job error races; production OpenClaw load; error snapshots arriving after the outer timeout resolves.
target.author: martingarramon

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
